reviews.comment:
Debe ser de las peores YPF del país, no te cobran con ningún medio electrónico y no te cargan los puntos serviclub, lo cual te avisan cuando ya cargaste. Adentro en la tienda desbordados, poco personal.

(Translated by Google)
This must be one of the worst YPF stores in the country. They don't charge you electronically, and they don't debit your Serviclub points, which they notify you when you've already charged. Inside the store, it's overcrowded, and there are few staff members.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCMk1EOXpRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Excelente la atención y loco estoy con los valores del combustible,en Mendoza 210 acá 137!!!!!

(Translated by Google)

reviews.comment:
Falta gente para la alta demanda  de turismo....explotado de autos..gente...después  dicen que las estaciones no andan...je...

reviews.comment:
Las chicas del Full con muy buena atención, la comida rica y rápida. Lastima que suele atender una sola persona en caja y la espera se hace larga en la fila.

(Translated by Google)
The staff at Full are very attentive, and the food is delicious and quick. It's a shame there's usually only one person at the register, and the wait in line is long.
